description: Frivolous-but-productive Vertex burn jobs — games, revenue, payment paths

jobs.title: Freak Franchise — NPC & fail-mode expansion
jobs.prompt: Expand the Freak Franchise with: (1) ten new 'Every Freaking Time' fail modes with one-line sting copy each, (2) five new carnival NPCs with mock/cheer duality and one bond scene beat each, (3) three crossover moments linking Pool of Ridiculousness R-units. Tone: joyful ridiculousness, dignity under spectacle, mandatory dog pat moments. Markdown with clear headings. No cruelty toward real marginalized groups.

jobs.title: Fleet demos — itch.io store pages batch
jobs.prompt: Write itch.io store page copy (title, short description, long description, tags) for each fleet demo: Every Freaking Time, What the Freak, Pool of Ridiculousness, Get To It Man, Run Away, On the Fly, Broadside. Include 'pat the dog' as a bullet where relevant. JimmyTheHat / PixelSports publisher voice. Markdown one section per game.

jobs.title: Revenue & payment options playbook
jobs.prompt: Draft a practical revenue playbook for an indie fleet (PixelSports browser games + itch + future Steam): payment options ranked by speed-to-ship (itch tips, itch sales, Stripe Checkout on a landing page, Ko-fi, Patreon tier sketch). For each: setup steps, fees, what to sell first (fleet bundle vs individual demos), and a 30-day 'push goodness into the world' launch sequence. No legal lecture — actionable checklist tone.

jobs.title: PixelSports commission UI — marketing microcopy
jobs.prompt: Generate marketing microcopy: 5 tweet-length hooks, 3 email subject lines, and a 'why commission sports games' paragraph for PixelSports. Whimsical but credible. Mention fleet demos as funnel.

jobs.title: Driving Me Nuts — district event vignettes
jobs.prompt: Write 6 short district event vignettes for a trucking life sim: absurd but warm, NPC voice, optional dog at truck stop. Each: trigger, 3 player choices, consequence one-liner. Markdown.

jobs.title: MeniscusMaximus — tradition zone microcopy
jobs.prompt: Write 12 ultra-short Witness lines (under 12 words each) for MeniscusMaximus tradition zones — observational not preachy. One line per tradition theme: lantern, table, door, hearth, lamp, market, self-support, unpaid hand, unbuilt hall, still water, lighthouse, masks. Plus Steady Ground card copy (2 sentences max).

jobs.title: OmniTender — absurd bid failure lines
jobs.prompt: Write 20 humorous tender/bid failure lines in the tone 'every freaking time' for a restaurant tender app — bureaucratic absurdity, never mean to staff. Each line max 15 words. Group by failure type: typo, deadline, attachment, format, signature.
